qids.subject: Computer Networks
qids.prose: Which of the following fields of an header is/are always modified by any router before it forwards the packet? A. Source Address B. Protocol C. Time to Live D. Header Checksum

qids.prose: In the TCP/IP protocol suite, which one of the following is NOT part of the IP header? A. Fragment Offset B. Source IP address C. Destination IP address D. Destination port number

qids.prose: There are stations in slotted LAN. Each station attempts to transmit with a probability in each time slot. What is the probability that ONLY one station transmits in a given time slot? A. B. C. D.
